ctx.name: Sarah
ctx.notes: We have issues with her not turning up to meetings on time

introQueue.label: The real version
introQueue.name: Tell me about your week — the real version.
introQueue.description: Kim Scott's 'care personally' made concrete. Signals that a performed answer won't cut it.

introQueue.label: Self-read opener
introQueue.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?
introQueue.description: Anchors the conversation in their self-assessment first; gap vs manager's view becomes a signal.

introQueue.label: What they're proud of
introQueue.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?
introQueue.description: Separates real wins from performative ones; calibrates their sense of impact.

focus_points.label: Punctuality in meetings and its impact
focus_points.reason: Notes mention issues with not turning up to meetings on time. Could be a signal of workload mismanagement, prioritization conflicts, or something else entirely — worth exploring the root cause.

focus_points.label: Communication clarity in meetings and updates
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — selected because this is a normal Performance & feedback topic for a Lead UX Lead. Ensuring clarity and effectiveness in communication is critical for a UX Lead role.

focus_points.label: Impact of UX initiatives this quarter
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard Performance & feedback anchor for a Lead. Evaluating the strategic impact of her UX initiatives can provide insights into her contributions at the team and company level.

focus_points.label: Collaboration with product and engineering teams
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — relevant for a UX Lead role. Effective collaboration with product and engineering is crucial for seamless UX delivery and cross-functional success.

focus_points.label: Areas for growth and skill development
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — selected because this is a normal Performance & feedback topic for a Lead UX Lead. Identifying areas for skill enhancement can help in planning her career trajectory.
